## Type of Change

- [ ] New script
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (tests + build + syntax check)
- [ ] Script has valid metadata (api, name, description, icon, tags)
- [ ] Script handles empty input without crashing
- [ ] Script uses `state.postError()` for user errors
- [ ] Script added to a category in `seo-data.json` (if new script)
- [ ] Tests added for non-trivial logic
- [ ] Copied to `vscode-extension/src/scripts/` (if new/modified script)
